title: Nutritional genomics, polyphenols, diets, and their impact on dietetics.
author: Barnes S
content: S-EPMC2692306 PMC2692306 Nutritional genomics, polyphenols, diets, and their impact on dietetics. Nutritional genomics offers a way to optimize human health and the quality of life. It is an attractive endeavor, but one with substantial challenges. It encompasses almost all known aspects of science
